---
title: "Resume"
author: "Vincent Gentry"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    title-block-banner: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-location: left
---

## Contact

| | |
|---|---|
| **Email** | your.email@example.com |
| **LinkedIn** | linkedin.com/in/yourprofile |
| **GitHub** | github.com/Vgentry10 |
| **Location** | City, State |

---

## Education

**Bachelor of Science — [Your Major]**  
Brigham Young University – Idaho | Expected Graduation: [Month Year]  
GPA: [X.XX]

Relevant Coursework: DS 250 (Data Science Programming), [Other courses]

---

## Skills

**Programming Languages:** Python, SQL  
**Libraries & Tools:** Pandas, Polars, NumPy, Scikit-learn, lets-plot, Jupyter, Quarto  
**Data Skills:** Data wrangling, exploratory analysis, machine learning, data visualization  
**Other:** Git/GitHub, VS Code, Microsoft Office

---

## Projects

### DS 250 Portfolio — Data Science Programming
*BYU-Idaho | [Semester Year]*

- Completed 5 units of data science projects using Python, Pandas, and machine learning
- Built predictive models using Random Forest and Decision Tree classifiers (scikit-learn)
- Analyzed the Star Wars Survey dataset; cleaned and visualized results to draw insights
- Created a public portfolio website using Quarto and GitHub Pages: [vgentry10.github.io/DS-250-Portfolio-](https://vgentry10.github.io/DS-250-Portfolio-/)

### [Project Name]
*[Context/Class] | [Date]*

- [Brief description of what you built or analyzed]
- [Tools used, results achieved]

---

## Work Experience

**[Job Title]**  
[Company Name] | [City, State] | [Start Date] – [End Date]

- [Key responsibility or accomplishment]
- [Key responsibility or accomplishment]

**[Job Title]**  
[Company Name] | [City, State] | [Start Date] – [End Date]

- [Key responsibility or accomplishment]
- [Key responsibility or accomplishment]

---

## Certifications & Community

- [Certification Name] — [Issuer], [Year]
- [DS Community Activity or Club]

---

## About Me

[Write 2–3 sentences about yourself, your interests, and your career goals in data science.]
